text: Here, surrounded by glass walls and vivid displays, I feel the energy of curiosity and creation. The presence of people behind the reflective pane, engaged in discourse or study, reminds me of how easily the boundaries between observer and participant blur in spaces devoted to knowledge. The bold R+D display and interactive screens invite exploration—this is a place brimming with possibility, yet also a subtle anxiety rests beneath my anticipation, as if on the threshold of new ideas I sense the weight of what I do not yet understand.
